name: Missed Routes Catch-up
manual_mismatches: Audit logs prerequisites omitted explicit audit.read and used exports-domain acknowledgement error mapping.
Expenses prerequisites were write-only and omitted read/view permission split.
Invite prerequisites incorrectly required authenticated business-context flow.
Invite errors were not aligned to token-expiry/password-policy framing for invite accept flow.
manual_fixes_applied: Updated EN/SW audit logs prerequisites to explicit audit.read requirement.
Updated EN/SW audit logs error mapping to branch-scope restriction and forbidden outcomes.
Updated EN/SW expenses prerequisites to expenses.read and expenses.write split.
Updated EN/SW expenses offline restriction causes/fixes to controller-aligned behavior.
Updated EN/SW invite prerequisites to public token-based flow prerequisites.
Updated EN/SW invite error guidance to token-expiry and password-policy outcomes.
Synchronized docs manual datasets to frontend runtime manual datasets.
